entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: 파인만 튜터는 수동적으로 답만 모으는 대신 AI를 학습에 집중해 활용하는 방식입니다. 이 모드는 특정 학습 과제를 중심으로 만들어졌습니다. 개념을 쉽게 설명해 봅니다. 당신의 튜터 spots gaps, 질문합니다 질문, and helps 당신 rebuild the 설명.

entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode: practical guide

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Feynman Tutor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Case Study Simulator. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of 하나 giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a 목표, try something, get 피드백, repair the weak spot, and choose the 다음 행동.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matters. A general chatbot can 답 almost anything, but a 학습 모드 gives the conversation a shape. It nudges 당신 toward the kind of 생각, 연습, 피드백, or exploration that helps the 아이디어 stick.

entries.source: Use Feynman Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
